Garlic Butter Chicken recipe (<15 mins): Seasoning blend (paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, dried oregano, thyme, salt, pepper, cayenne). Season boneless chicken thighs, cook 4-5 mins each side. Add 2 tbsp butter + 2 cloves garlic.

Misir Wot Recipe (4-6 servings): 1 cup red lentils, 2 onions, 2 cloves garlic, 1 tbsp ginger, 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp coriander, 0.5 tsp turmeric, 0.5 tsp paprika, 0.25 tsp cayenne, 1 can tomatoes, 2 cups vegetable broth, 2 tbsp niter kibbeh. Sauté onions 8 mins, add garlic/ginger 1 min, add lentils/spices, add tomatoes/broth, simmer 20-25 mins.

Injera Bread Recipe (4-6 servings): 2 cups teff flour, 2 cups all-purpose flour, 0.5 cup yeast, 1.5 cups water, 0.5 tsp salt. Start sourdough starter: 0.5 cup teff + 0.5 cup water, sit 24-48 hrs. Mix, rest 24-48 hrs, cook on heated skillet.

Teff flour: ancient grain from Ethiopia/Eritrea, gluten-free, high protein (7-8%), fiber/iron/minerals. Dark brown color, nutty earthy flavor, slightly bitter, coarser texture. Absorbs more liquid than other flours.

User studied Renaissance political philosophy impact: shift from religious/monarchic medieval authority to classical humanism, individualism, democracy.
Humanism: emphasized individual and human potential over religious/national/dynastic concerns. Departure from medieval divine authority.
Social contract: government legitimized by governed consent. Challenged medieval divine right monarchy, laid groundwork for modern democracy.
Political realism: emerged during Renaissance, advocated pursuit of power/self-interest as primary political goals. Influenced Machiavelli and Hobbes.
Civic humanism: individuals have duty to participate actively in city/state affairs. Civic engagement essential for personal/societal well-being.
Republicanism: emphasized virtuous citizenry and common good over individual interests. System based on rule of law, individual rights/freedoms, limited government.

User submitted mortgage application documents: pay stubs, bank statements, tax returns. Seeking guidance on post-submission process.

Post-submission mortgage steps: Initial Review (1-3 days), Loan Processing (3-5 days), Appraisal (5-10 days), Underwriting (5-10 days), Conditional Approval, Clearing Conditions, Final Approval, Funding, Closing.

Appraisal: independent property value evaluation by licensed appraiser. Based on property characteristics, location, market conditions, comparable sales. Lender requires to ensure property value ≥ loan amount.
User planning 5% down payment. LTV Ratio = (Loan Amount ÷ Appraised Value) × 100. 5% down = 95% LTV. Higher LTV = higher risk.
Loan processor reviews, organizes, prepares loan file. Responsibilities: file review, document verification, ordering services, data entry, loan submission, condition clearing.
Income verification: gross income, income type, income frequency. Required documents: recent pay stubs, W-2s (past 2 years), tax returns (past 2 years), VOE letter.

Employment verification methods: employer VOE form, third-party VOE vendors, phone/email direct contact, online employer portal. VOE includes: employee name/ID, job title/duties, employment status, length, income.
